description: Replace these filters with the exact immutable RepoQA subset used to produce Table 3(b) in the SBES 2026 tool paper.
notes: An empty trialIds list does not mean the complete baseline automatically matches the paper subset.
Prefer explicit trial IDs when the exact paper subset has been identified.
Do not claim exact paper reproduction until analyze_repoqa.py --verify passes against expected/tool-paper-table-3b.csv.
